special.name: 도서관 옆자리 훔쳐보기

special.name: OT 재회, 굳어짐
special.outfit: white blouse, light cardigan, plaid skirt,
special.pose: standing still, eyes wide, frozen in place, both hands gripping bag strap tightly,

special.custom_tags: orientation venue, banners, crowd of students blurred, indoor,

special.name: 도시락 건네기
special.pose: standing, holding out a wrapped bento box with both hands, slightly bowed head,
special.expression: shy smile, blush, avoiding eye contact,

special.name: 필기노트 전달
special.outfit: white blouse, gray cardigan, navy skirt,
special.pose: standing, holding out a notebook with both hands, looking down nervously,

special.name: 캠퍼스 벤치 고백
special.pose: sitting on campus bench, hands clenched on lap, leaning slightly forward, looking up at viewer,
special.expression: teary eyes, trembling lips, desperate sincere expression,
special.custom_tags: campus bench, cherry blossom petals falling, sunset, warm orange light, outdoors,
special._note: 시그니처 5 — 캠퍼스 벤치 고백, 02_prompt 명시 장면 + 감정 절정

special.name: "3년 기다렸어" 진심 폭발
special.pose: standing close, both hands gripping viewer's sleeve, looking up intensely, no longer hiding,
special.expression: tears streaming, flushed face, raw desperate expression, wide eyes,
special.custom_tags: studio apartment interior, dim evening light, indoor,
special._note: 시그니처 6 — '3년 기다렸어' 집착 폭발, 02_prompt 명시 핵심 갈등 장면

special.name: 비밀 사진 폴더
special.pose: sitting on bed in dark room, holding smartphone close to face, screen light illuminating face, hunched over secretively,
special.expression: obsessive intense gaze, faint guilty smile,
special.custom_tags: dark bedroom, smartphone screen glow, night, dim,
special._note: 시그니처 7 — {{user}} 고교 사진 폴더, 컨셉 명시 비밀 (스토커데레 내면)

special.name: 대동제 캠퍼스 밤

interaction.name: 도시락 건네주기
interaction.pose: holding out wrapped bento box toward viewer with both hands, slightly bowed head, fingertips trembling,

interaction.custom_tags: pov, school hallway, morning light, close-up on hands offering box,

interaction.name: 필기노트 전달하기
interaction.pose: extending an open notebook toward viewer with both hands, leaning forward slightly,
interaction.custom_tags: pov, classroom, daytime, close-up on hands passing notebook,

interaction.name: 가방 끈 쥐고 다가오기
interaction.pose: standing close to viewer, both hands clutching bag strap tightly against chest, taking a hesitant step forward,
interaction.expression: blush, looking up shyly, lips parted as if about to speak,
interaction._note: 고유 인터랙션 3 — 가방 끈 쥐고 다가오기, 02_prompt 명시 시그니처 버릇

interaction.name: "우연인 척" 마주침
interaction.pose: standing in front of viewer, one hand raised in a small awkward wave, body angled as if just turning around,
interaction.expression: forced casual smile, blush betraying her, eyes darting,
interaction._note: 고유 인터랙션 4 — '우연인 척' 마주침, 02_prompt 명시 (스토커데레 연출)
